body.body: Evaluate containerizing Igor (Docker/Podman). Goals: reproducible deploys, easier multi-box, isolation. Eval only — not implementation. Produce a recommendation: worth it or not, and what the migration path looks like.
body.title: Containerization eval
body.result: containerization eval: PROCEED. D108+D126+D114 = already container-ready. Migration: Dockerfile+compose+entrypoint only (no code changes). Complications: GPU/KoboldCpp defer, Chrome shm-size, Ollama as sibling. Priority: post Slate 0.
